name: 5 Point Jewelry & Loan. Pawn Shop
description_short: Torrance, CA pawn shop offering collateral loans and purchases on gold, jewelry, luxury watches, designer handbags, electronics, and collectibles.
description_long:
5 Points Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop located in Torrance, California, operating under the calipawn.com domain. The shop serves the greater South Bay area of Los Angeles, providing collateral-based short-term loans and outright purchases of a broad range of valuables. Customer reviews highlight a consistent, named staff — particularly Hannah and Jamie — who are praised for professionalism and transparent pricing compared to competing shops in the area.

The shop accepts items across several categories: gold and precious metals, diamonds and gemstones, fine jewelry, luxury watches, designer handbags, electronics and tech, musical instruments, collectibles, antiques, and tools. Customers can either sell items outright or use them as collateral for a short-term pawn loan. An online item estimator form is available on their website, allowing prospective customers to submit item details and photos and receive an initial offer within 24 hours.

Several promotional loan terms distinguish 5 Points from typical pawn operations. All loans carry no interest for the first two days — only a small storage fee applies during that window. Loans under $100 are offered with just $1 in interest plus a small storage and setup fee. Loans exceeding $2,500 qualify for a 2.9% promotional interest rate for the first month. The shop also claims that in 90% of cases, its purchase offers exceed those of competing companies, though this is an unverified marketing claim.

As a single-location brick-and-mortar pawn shop, 5 Points Jewelry & Loan is well-suited for local Torrance-area consumers who need immediate cash without a credit check, but it has limited reach for anyone outside the immediate area. The promotional loan terms are genuinely competitive by pawn industry standards, but the website does not disclose what interest rates apply after promotional periods end, nor does it detail ongoing storage fees — information borrowers should clarify in person before committing.
pros: First 2 days no interest on all loans — only a small storage fee applies during that window
Loans under $100 carry only $1 in interest plus a small storage and setup fee
Promotional 2.9% first-month interest rate available on loans over $2,500
Free online item estimator with responses promised within 24 hours
Claims to offer higher purchase prices than competitors in 90% of cases
Accepts a wide range of items: gold, diamonds, jewelry, watches, handbags, electronics, instruments, collectibles
Consistently positive reviews citing honest, professional staff by name (Hannah, Jamie)
cons: Single location in Torrance, CA — no accessibility for consumers outside the immediate area
Post-promotional interest rates and ongoing storage fees not disclosed on the website
The '90% higher price' claim is unverified marketing language with no third-party substantiation
No information on maximum loan amounts, loan term lengths, or state pawnbroker licensing details
Online estimator is not an instant offer — requires a form submission and up to 24-hour wait
best_for: Torrance-area residents needing fast cash collateral loans without a credit check
Sellers of gold, jewelry, or luxury goods seeking competitive purchase offers
Shoppers looking for pre-owned luxury items, watches, or handbags at pawn prices
Borrowers needing small short-term loans under $100 at minimal cost
diagnosis: 5 Points Jewelry & Loan is best suited for Torrance, CA residents who need immediate cash via a collateral loan or want a competitive offer when selling jewelry, gold, or luxury goods locally. The promotional no-interest and low-rate terms are genuinely attractive by pawn industry standards, but borrowers should ask in-store about storage fees that apply during the no-interest window and the interest rate structure that kicks in after promotional periods expire before accepting a loan.
services: Electronics and tech buying and pawning
Online item value estimator with 24-hour response
